title: 카탈로그 모듈 Phase B — 가격 정책 + 홀드백 (1.2.2 + 1.2.3)

steps.name: pricing-service
steps.summary: pricing_service.py(set/matrix/bulk/log/delete) + 단위테스트 11건 통과 — upsert 멱등·변경 로그·매트릭스·bulk batch_id 검증

steps.name: holdback-service

steps.name: catalog-pricing-api

steps.name: catalog-pricing-fe
